conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// in the sidebar/compact call panel, only show who is speaking + viewer count
  const showCountsInHeader = !compact;

preservedBehaviors.description: Component exports default function CampaignCallPanel with compact, showRoster, rosterMode props
safeRoomName generates slugified room name with anything- prefix
Player and viewer counts derived from presence_role field
isPlayerFull blocks non-owners from joining as player when slots full
Viewers join with (Viewer) suffix and audio/video muted by default
GM tools (toggle mic/cam, mute all, stop video, clear presence) shown for owner in full mode
In-room roster list with player/viewer badges and kick/role-change for owner
Compact mode shows 'Call' header text instead of 'Voice + Video Room'
Compact iframe height is h-[180px] (ours value)
Compact header hides player count and room name, shows only viewer count and speaking label
normalizeDisplayName strips (Viewer) suffix for speaker matching
speakingPresence computed via useMemo matching normalized speakingName to presence list
Speaker card shows avatar and display_name from speakingPresence, with viewer count
Speaker card fallback shows 'No one yet.' with optional viewer count
